title: Road Quality Tool
description: Create a tool for visualizing road quality between cities. Color-code road segments based on quality (green=good, yellow=fair, red=poor). Show road quality affects on travel speed and distance. Display road improvement options and costs.
definition-of-done: Tool shows all road segments. Color coding clear and intuitive. Quality effects displayed on hover. Improvement options visible.
testing-plan: Test road visualization. Verify color coding accuracy. Test hover information. Confirm improvement display.
todos: Add color coding for quality levels
